author: @sama
name: Sam Altman
text: AGI is closer than we think. The scaling laws hold. Keep building and adapting.

author: @swyx
name: Shawn @ swyx.io
text: AI engineering is the new frontend. If you only know React in 2026, you are competing with machines.

author: @ThePrimeagen
name: ThePrimeagen
text: VIM is not a text editor. It is a way of life. Also, stop using any-types in TypeScript.

author: @karpathy
name: Andrej Karpathy
text: English is the hottest new programming language. But you still need to know how the compiler works.

author: @dan_abramov
name: Dan Abramov
text: UI engineering is fundamentally about managing state over time. Frameworks change, the physics of the DOM remain.

author: @lexfridman
name: Lex Fridman
text: The hardest programming problem is figuring out what to build, not how to build it.

author: @ylecun
name: Yann LeCun
text: Auto-Regressive LLMs suck. They do not plan, they do not reason, they just predict the next token.

author: @rauchg
name: Guillermo Rauch
text: Latency is the mind killer. If your UI takes more than 100ms to respond, the illusion is broken.

author: @shuding_
name: Shu Ding
text: We just shipped a new compiler. It's 10x faster and uses 50% less memory. Rust is eating the frontend tooling.

author: @linusgti
name: Linus Torvalds
text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
